title: Caves & Canyons
description: Save your surface, find your underground adventure!
body:
**This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!**

---
Already tired of those holes and gaps ruining the surface? Now you’ll no longer be upset.

- Canyons are now rift valleys, rather than the stupid little gaps lying on the ground. They are longer, wider, and deeper, deep down to y:-20! Providing you a fast way to travel between different levels.
Meanwhile, they are now pretty rare, making every encounter of yours impressive and rewarding. Get on the trip to find them!

- The caves will not mess with the surface that much now, as the entrances are narrower. The deeper you go, the bigger caves will be.

Enjoy your vacations on the ground and the adventures underground!

This datapack could be incompatible with other  worldgen data packs.
